name: Thermon Group Holdings, Inc.
summary: Business Overview We are one of the largest providers of highly engineered industrial process heating solutions for process industries. For 70years, we have served a diverse base of thousands of customers around the world in attractive and growing markets, including general industrial, chemical and petrochemical, oil, gas, power generation, commercial, food and beverage, rail and transit, and other, which we refer to as our "key end markets."
